About Me

The mind
behind the work.

I'm Ilham Aidil — a fresh graduate from SMA Negeri 6 Kota Depok with a deep passion for digital creativity, visual design, and modern web experiences.

From building aesthetic websites to crafting engaging video content, I approach every project with attention to detail and a drive to deliver work that stands out.

Currently exploring opportunities where creativity meets technology, with a focus on design, editing, and digital content creation for the modern web.
